title: Lordi's Little Pack
description:
A lightweight pack that aims to subtly improve the vanilla experience without deviating far from Mojang's vision.

Many performance mods, few visual mods, and even fewer content mods.
body:
A lightweight pack that aims to subtly improve the vanilla experience without deviating far from Mojang's vision.

Many performance mods, few visual mods, and even fewer content mods.

---

This pack is subject to change to fit whatever I see as a good change in my personal opinion. The pack is designed primarily for singleplayer, and so will not contain mods like Simple Voice Chat, but it will function if run on a server.

---

Resource pack from [https://vanillatweaks.net/](https://vanillatweaks.net/)!
